titleStmt.title: SII 15.697: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 697. (B.K. No. 178 of 1926-27.) RŌṆ, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Hanumān temple near the Dharmaśālā.
This is dated the cyclic year Krōdhi, Mārgaśira, śu. 15. The details cannot be verified.

It records the confirmation of an earlier gift of land to Nārasimhadāsa, son of Goḍasala Koṇḍadāsa for the worship of the god Hanumanta. The gift was confirmed by Malarasaya who was the agent of Immaḍi Manvanāyaka of the Gujala family of Kushṭige and Pārupatyagāra of Bādāvi-sīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī krōdhi saṁ . ma¨rgaśira śu 15 lu kuṣṭi
geya gujala yiṁmaḍi maṁnvanāyyaka
voḍeyara kā¨ryake ka¨rtarāda bādā
viya sīmeya pārupatyagāra malara
sayagaḷu nārasiṁhadāsage pū¨rvvada mānya
vanu nisudhiya māḍikoṭuda hanumaṁta
dēvara sēveyanu māḍuvadake goḍasala
koṁḍadāsana makaḷu nārasiṁhadāsage
koṭa mūḍala hola sa¨rvvamānya
yī mānyake Āvanobanu ta
pidare gōhatya brahmatya taṁma taṁdi
tāyi hōhā
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.697 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
